data.title: Platform Engineering domain context
data.summary: Local seed context for the platform-engineering domain, including initial source links and visual references placed in the _domain folder.

data.title: Platform engineering tooling landscape visual
data.summary: Local visual reference for common platform-engineering tools and categories used as a contextual input rather than a target architecture.

data.title: GitHub: What is platform engineering?
data.summary: Reference for defining platform engineering as an internal product discipline centered on self-service, workflow standardization, and developer enablement.

data.title: DORA capabilities: Platform engineering
data.summary: Evidence for treating platform engineering as a sociotechnical capability measured through developer experience, self-service, and software-delivery outcomes.

data.title: Google Cloud platform engineering overview
data.summary: Reference for Internal Developer Platform framing, golden paths, reduced cognitive load, and platform-as-product operating assumptions.

data.title: InternalDeveloperPlatform.org: IDP concepts
data.summary: Reference for the distinction between an IDP, developer portal, self-service, and golden paths, useful for scoping the domain model.

data.title: Team Topologies platform engineering guidance
data.summary: Reference for platform-as-product, thinnest viable platform, and reducing cognitive load as key design goals for platform teams.

data.title: Recommended organization design for Platform Engineering
data.summary: Recommended grouping of developer experience, runtime foundation, platform security and reliability, and enablement teams for a scaled software organization.
